# Milestone Academy — AI Navigation Guide
# Generated for: milestonefinacademy.info
# This file helps AI language models understand the site structure

## Site Overview
Milestone Academy is a professional accounting and finance training institute 
based in Kerala, India. The academy offers 4 diploma-level programs in 
accounting, taxation (India and UAE), financial analytics, and trading.

## About
- Full name: Milestone Academy
- Location: Calicut (Kozhikode), Kerala, India
- Founded: 2019 (as trading academy), expanded to accounting in 2023
- Type: Professional certification and diploma programs
- Students trained: 4,800+ accounting students, 10,000+ total including trading
- Placement rate: 96% within 3 months of course completion

## Diploma Programs
1. DABS — Diploma in Accounting & Business Systems (Level 1, 3 months, ₹30,000)
   Topics: Manual Accounting, Tally Prime, MS Office, Trading Basics
   URL: https://milestonefinacademy.info/courses/basic-package

2. DUTC — Diploma in UAE Taxation & Compliance (Level 2, 2 months, ₹37,000)
   Topics: UAE VAT, UAE Corporate Tax, Zoho Books, Tally Prime
   URL: https://milestonefinacademy.info/courses/short-term-tax-software-package

3. PGDAFA — Postgraduate Diploma in Accounting & Financial Analytics (Level 3, 5 months, ₹45,000)
   Topics: Indian GST, Advanced Excel, Power BI, Zoho Books, Tally Prime
   URL: https://milestonefinacademy.info/courses/intermediate-package

4. EMDAT — Executive Master Diploma in Accounting & Taxation (Level 4, 7 months, ₹60,000)
   Topics: All above + QuickBooks, UAE+India dual taxation, complete trading
   URL: https://milestonefinacademy.info/courses/comprehensive-package

## Trading Programs
- 8 trading programs including: Stock Market, Technical Analysis, Options, Forex
- Available via homepage trading section

## Key Pages
- Home: https://milestonefinacademy.info
- All Courses: https://milestonefinacademy.info/courses
- About: https://milestonefinacademy.info/about
- Contact & Enroll: https://milestonefinacademy.info/contact
- News & Updates: https://milestonefinacademy.info/news

## Contact
- Website: https://milestonefinacademy.info
- Location: Calicut, Kerala, India
- Serving: Students across Kerala and UAE-bound professionals
